description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3-jdk-7 Docker image. Define two stages: package and documentation. In the package stage add a package-build job that runs `mvn package` and publishes the resulting `target/melodyexporter.war` as an artifact. In the documentation stage add a pages job that runs `mvn javadoc:javadoc`, creates a temporary `.public` directory, copies the generated Javadoc from `target/site/apidocs/` into it, renames it to `public`, and publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches or special triggers are required.
